gmcm.option.enabled.name: Enable mod
gmcm.option.use-ai-cache.name: Use AI cache
gmcm.option.use-ai-cache.tooltip: Reuses generated dialogue to avoid repeated AI calls within the same session.
gmcm.option.player-reply.name: Reply to NPC comment
gmcm.option.player-reply.tooltip: Opens a prompt for the player to reply after the NPC comments on their appearance. When enabled, the NPC can react to the player's written response.
gmcm.option.profile-enabled.name: Enable profile
gmcm.option.profile-enabled.tooltip: Check this profile to use it when generating compliments. Only one profile should be enabled at a time.
gmcm.option.provider.name: Provider
gmcm.option.provider.tooltip: Choose which AI service this profile will use to generate compliments.
gmcm.option.model.name: Model
gmcm.option.model.tooltip: Enter the model name to be used by this profile.
gmcm.option.api-key.name: API Key
gmcm.option.api-key.tooltip: The key corresponding to this profile's provider. For local AI, it can usually be left blank.
gmcm.option.endpoint.name: Server endpoint
gmcm.option.endpoint.tooltip: Optional: leave blank to use the provider's default endpoint. Fill it in only for a proxy, custom endpoint, or local AI.
gmcm.option.vision-mode.name: AI visual analysis
gmcm.option.vision-mode.tooltip: Allows this profile to see and analyze the player's appearance, including clothing, hair, hat, and accessories. It's recommended to keep Automatic as the default. Enable only for models with image support and disable for text-only models.
gmcm.option.temperature.name: Temperature
gmcm.option.timeout.name: Timeout
gmcm.option.timeout.tooltip: Maximum time, in seconds, to wait for the provider to respond.
gmcm.option.min-characters.name: Minimum characters
gmcm.option.min-characters.tooltip: Sets the minimum length of text the AI should try to reach.
gmcm.option.max-characters.name: Maximum characters
gmcm.option.max-characters.tooltip: Sets the maximum length of text the AI can generate.
gmcm.option.npc-reaction-chance.name: NPC reaction chance
gmcm.option.npc-reaction-chance.tooltip: Chance for each nearby NPC to notice the player's appearance.
gmcm.option.npc-repeated-visual-chance.t: Chance for an NPC to react to a visual they have already seen before (lower keeps repeats from being noticed as often). Requires NPC memory.
gmcm.option.romantic-partners-always-not: If enabled, every dating partner and spouse always notices a valid change while nearby and in line of sight. Krobus continues using the normal chances.
gmcm.option.debug-logging.name: Enable debug logging
gmcm.option.debug-logging.tooltip: Show detailed operational logs (reaction flow, AI requests, NPC notices) in the SMAPI console. Leave off for a clean console; turn on only when troubleshooting.
gmcm.option.vanilla-hat-mode.name: Vanilla hat reaction
gmcm.option.vanilla-hat-mode.tooltip: Choose how villagers react when you wear a vanilla (non-Fashion Sense) hat. 'Outfit + hat' reacts to your whole look together with the hat. 'Hat only' makes them react exclusively to the hat, ignoring the rest of the outfit - which can produce funnier, more focused reactions.
gmcm.option.vanilla-special-item-mode.to: Choose how villagers react when you wear a special vanilla item (e.g. Mayor's Purple Shorts). 'Item only' makes them react exclusively to the item, ignoring the rest of the outfit. 'Outfit + item' lets them react to both the item and how it fits (or clashes) with your current look.
gmcm.option.outfit-notice-distance.name: Distance to notice appearance
gmcm.option.outfit-notice-distance.toolt: Maximum distance for any NPC (including spouse) to notice the player's appearance change.
gmcm.option.outfit-cancel-distance.name: Distance to cancel reaction
gmcm.option.outfit-cancel-distance.toolt: If the player moves further than this distance before the NPC can react, the pending reaction will be canceled.
gmcm.option.expressive-actions.name: Expressive actions
gmcm.option.expressive-actions.tooltip: Allows the AI to include brief physical actions in asterisks (e.g. *sighs*, *looks away*). Disable if you prefer clean spoken dialogue only.
gmcm.option.fs-id-hint.name: Use Fashion Sense ID as hint
gmcm.option.fs-id-hint.tooltip: Uses the clothing piece's internal Fashion Sense ID as a hint for the AI about its theme. Works better when the ID is descriptive and matches what the piece actually looks like, rather than just a number or a name unrelated to the visual (e.g. "Set04").
gmcm.option.voice-samples.name: Use voice samples
gmcm.option.voice-samples.tooltip: Includes a few real lines from the NPC's own dialogue as a style reference, so reactions sound more like them. Their personality profile still leads the writing.
gmcm.option.voice-sample-count.name: Voice sample count
gmcm.option.voice-sample-count.tooltip: How many real lines to use as reference. Kept low by default (6) to keep the prompt short.
gmcm.option.voice-sample-excluded.name: Voice samples: excluded NPCs
gmcm.option.voice-sample-excluded.toolti: NPCs to skip voice samples for, separated by commas. Example: Sebastian, Abigail
menu.reply-after-compliment.title: Reply:
menu.reply-choice.title: Reply to the comment?
menu.reply-input.title: Write your reply:
